Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Bands worn around the head, made of cloth, leather, metal, or various other materials, typically worn to keep the hair in place, for decorative purposes, or as a sign of status or rank.
Banda que se lleva alrededor de la cabeza.
Banden die om het hoofd worden gedragen.

Band aus Stoff, Leder, Metall oder verschiedenen anderen Materialien, das um den Kopf getragen wird; in der Regel getragen, um die Haare in Position zu halten, für dekorative Zwecke oder als Zeichen eines Status oder Rangs.
環繞頭部而戴的帶子，以布、皮革、金屬或其他各種材料製成，通常戴上以固定頭髮、裝飾，或標示地位或階級。
